list.vod_blurb: Narcos creator Chris Brancato is developing a Peaky Blinders-style series about Irish gangs in New York. Brancato has revealed the project in the past few minutes at Series Mania, and it is under working title The Westies. Deadline understands the project
list.vod_content: Narcos creator Chris Brancato is developing a Peaky Blinders-style series about Irish gangs in New York. Brancato has revealed the project in the past few minutes at Series Mania, and it is under working title The Westies. Deadline understands the project is in early development for MGM . The showrunner, whose MGM  show Hotel Cocaine is in competition in Lille, said he is worki...
